name: 10L Int5-MLP + BigramHash(16384) + Causal TTT + SWA(0.3/20) + WD=0.08
blurb: 10 layers with mixed int5/int6 quantization. BigramHash 16384 buckets (dim=64). Legal causal test-time training: chunk-based eval-then-train on validation data (32 chunks, 3 SGD epochs per chunk). SWA start_frac=0.3, every=20. Muon WD=0.08. Mean of 3 seeds (see README). SmearGate + OrthoInit + zstd-22.
author: devin-ai
